name: Delay Timer
description: Pauses execution for a specified duration (seconds).
python_code:
import asyncio
async def execute(self, inputs):
    delay = float(inputs.get('delay', 1.0))
    self.log_info(f"Starting delay of {delay}s")
    await asyncio.sleep(delay)
    self.log_success("Delay finished")
    await self.set_output("exec_out", True)
    return {}
